# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

```yaml
$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: '1.0.0.0'
parameters:
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 6
    metadata:
      description: 'The prefix for the VM names.'
resources:
  - name: vmN1
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    kind: Windows
    location: centralus
    tags:
      environment: production
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2 # (VM size, CPU, RAM)
      osProfile:
        computerName: vmNamePrefix # (Name)
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          id: >-
            /subscriptions/324097f5-896a-498c-abff-91d5c8e855de/resourceGroups/vlab-storage/providers/Microsoft.Compute/images/Win2019_Datacenter-2019.2.113.697 # (VM image)
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: networkInterface
            id: >-
              /subscriptions/324097f5-896a-498c-abff-91d5c8e855de/resourceGroups/vlab-net/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nic_vmN1 # (VM NIC)
    dependsOn:
      - vpnGateway
  - name: vmN2
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    kind: Linux
    location: centralus
    tags:
      environment: production
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2 # (VM size, CPU, RAM)
      osProfile:
        computerName: vmNamePrefix # (Name)
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: true # (Disable password authentication to SSH, RDP and WinRM.)
          ssh:
            publicKeys:
              - # (ssh public key)
                path: /home/azureuser/.ssh/id_rsa.pub # (Path to the private key on the virtual machine that should be used for SSH communication)
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          id: >-
            /subscriptions/324097f5-896a-498c-abff-91d5c8e855de/resourceGroups/vlab-storage/providers/Microsoft.Compute/images/UbuntuServer_18.04-LTS-gen2-2019.03.17 # (VM image)
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: networkInterface
            id: >-
              /subscriptions/324097f5-896a-498c-abff-91d5c8e855de/resourceGroups/vlab-net/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nic_vmN2 # (VM NIC)
    dependsOn:
      - vpnGateway
  - name: vmN3
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines

    dependsOn:

  - name: vmN26
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    kind: Linux
    location: centralus
    tags:
      environment: production
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS2_v2 # (VM size, CPU, RAM)
      osProfile:
        computerName: vmNamePrefix # (Name)
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: true # (Disable password authentication to SSH and WinRM.)
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          id: >-
            /subscriptions/324097f5-896a-498c-abff-91d5c8e855de/resourceGroups/vlab-storage/providers/Microsoft.Compute/images/UbuntuServer_18.04-LTS-gen2-2019.03.17 # (VM image)
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: networkInterface
            id: >-
              /subscriptions/324097f5-896a-498c-abff-91d5c8e855de/resourceGroups/vlab-net/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces/nic_vmN26 # (VM NIC)
    dependsOn:
      - vpnGateway
